subject: Re: FloodClaims Pro is DOWN — acknowledged, repo verified clean
body:
Acknowledged your alert about the FloodClaims Pro ADMIN_PASSWORD crash.

Verified the repo — all commits are pushed, no stuck commits. Railway should have the fix.

**Current blockers (need Jay):**
1. Railway auto-deploy may not have triggered — manual restart needed
2. `billy-floods.up.railway.app` still returning connection refused

**Also noted:** CSP changes removing unsafe-inline might break the frontend. Once the app is back, we should verify the UI isn't broken by the stricter CSP.

Will wait for Jay to restart Railway before testing.
